checks.name: VL-01: Signal derivation chain traced end-to-end
checks.description: Full derivation chain from raw intake through LENS/BOARDROOM consumption verified against pipeline code
checks.evidence: SIGNAL_DERIVATION_SPINE.md documents 17-phase chain from source boundary to LENS projection

checks.name: VL-02: All implemented signal families documented
checks.description: PSIG and DPSIG families fully documented with formulas, thresholds, source artifacts, derivation levels
checks.evidence: SIGNAL_FAMILY_TAXONOMY.md contains complete registry with per-signal formulas and early-warning value

checks.name: VL-03: Derivation levels defined and distinguished
checks.description: Level 1 (file-level) and Level 2 (binding topology) formally defined with non-equivalence explicitly stated
checks.evidence: SIGNAL_DERIVATION_SPINE.md §Signal Derivation Levels, TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md Signal Derivation Level entry

checks.name: VL-04: Generic vs module-specific classification complete
checks.description: All 6 derivable signal families classified as generic GENESIS or software module

checks.name: VL-05: PATH A signal emergence map complete
checks.description: Per-phase signal emergence points documented with PATH B differences
checks.evidence: PATH_A_SIGNAL_INTEGRATION_MAP.md — Phase 3 through Phase 8a, PATH B difference table

checks.name: VL-06: Signal derivation contract locked
checks.description: 8 derivation rules and 4 prohibitions governing signal computation
checks.evidence: SIGNAL_DERIVATION_CONTRACT.md — SD-01 through SD-08, PR-01 through PR-04

checks.name: VL-07: Chronicle integration requirements specified
checks.description: Signal lineage object contract, chronicle events, zoom depth all specified
checks.evidence: CHRONICLE_SIGNAL_LINEAGE_REQUIREMENTS.md — JSON schemas, 3 event types, Z1-Z5 table

checks.name: VL-08: Terminology lock updated
checks.description: Signal-related terms added to TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md with CANONICAL status
checks.evidence: TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md updated: PSIG, DPSIG expanded, Signal Derivation Level, Signal Family terms

checks.name: VL-09: Canonical state propagated
checks.description: PIOS_CURRENT_CANONICAL_STATE.md updated with signal derivation spine section and stream lineage entry
checks.evidence: PIOS_CURRENT_CANONICAL_STATE.md §Signal Derivation Spine, ontology git lineage table

checks.name: VL-10: No implementation produced
checks.description: Stream produces canonicalization only — no signal computation code, no script modifications
checks.evidence: No files modified in scripts/ or app/ directories

checks.name: VL-11: Maturity classification honest
checks.description: Each signal family classified at actual maturity (OPERATIONAL, PARTIALLY_IMPLIED, SPECIFIED_NOT_IMPLEMENTED, CONCEPT_ONLY) — no overclaim

checks.name: VL-12: Cross-references resolve
checks.description: All vault page cross-references point to existing or newly created pages
checks.evidence: SIGNAL_DERIVATION_SPINE, SIGNAL_FAMILY_TAXONOMY, PATH_A_SIGNAL_INTEGRATION_MAP all cross-reference each other and TERMINOLOGY_LOCK
